title: v7.0 frontier: agent session event stream
description: Implement the first Agent Session Observability slice: session-event-record schema, runtime-event-stream schema, local event writer, session-observability-audit, and tests proving AI work links to tasks, requirements, test evidence, risk candidates, decision candidates, and release-ready evidence.
triage_notes: Opened from runtime situation-assess recommendation after v6.9.0 release.
